title: BlackBerry Q3 2024 Earnings Beat
text: BlackBerry (NYSE: BB) exceeded analyst expectations in its third quarter 2024 results. The company reported earnings per share of 1 cent, which surpassed the analyst forecast of -3 cents per share. On the revenue side, BlackBerry generated $175 million, slightly outperforming the projected $173.53 million—representing a 0.85% advantage over estimates. This earnings coverage leverages data to automate coverage of quarterly earnings reports, focusing on key metrics like EPS and revenue performance against analyst consensus.
